## Dependencies

## How to run

Executable entry points (have a `__main__` block):

- `python github_sync.py`
- `python gmail_harvester.py`
- `python prune_logs.py`

## Modules

### `github_sync.py`

KAI_9000 GitHub Sync Service
Automates README upgrades, CHANGELOG updates, and project snapshots.

- `get_oauth_token()`
- `github_api_request(method, endpoint, data)`
- `sync_readme()` — Pushes the local README.md to the GitHub repository.
- `create_snapshot()` — Creates a tagged snapshot of the current TIC_LOG and ROADMAP.

### `gmail_harvester.py`

KAI_9000 Gmail Me-to-Me Harvester
Scrapes emails sent from user to user and extracts tasks/axioms.

- `load_config()`
- `generate_oauth2_string(email, refresh_token)`
- `connect_imap(config)`
- `harvest_emails(mail, email_address)`
- `save_tasks(tasks)`

### `prune_logs.py`

- `prune_logs(keep_count)`
